title: Prismarine+
body:
# **Prismarine+**
This is a small mod that adds more decorative blocks for Prismarine. Adds Polished, Chisled, Cracked, and Polished Prismarine and Chiseled, Tiled and Cracked Dark Prismarine, alongside more wall options missing from vanilla Minecraft.
![Prismarine+ Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69820e4942f832b969b0b64f0c9ae3cf1fd64597.png)
![Dark Prismarine Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/934a76fa9d9e4a0541dc19338dd1fb9cc31c8d09.webp)
# **Warning!**
Conduits do NOT work with these blocks. 
I do not have much (if any) coding experience and is out of my range.
Would love the help if anyone could!
